title: How to copy column values
excerpt:
Here is what i am looking for 
I just want to copy my emails so I can use it some where else

posts.author: AnishJ (Anish)
posts.cookedHtml:
Here is what i am looking for

I just want to copy my emails so I can use it some where else

Copy-to-clipboard selected values from a column? Platform discussions
Is there a way to copy to clipboard several values from a single column for selected pulses? My use case: Sometimes I want to email a handful of people, and it would be nice to be able to find them in Monday (listed as pulses), select the people I want to email, and copy the values from the email column to paste into the “to” field in my email (or wherever else, like another spreadsheet). It would also be nice to be able to do this without having to go through exporting to Excel, copying, delet…
